channel.title: Persuasion on MarkJacobsen.net
channel.description: Recent content in Persuasion on MarkJacobsen.net

item.title: The Hardest Sell: Convincing Someone You’re Not What You Used to Be
item.description:
A worthwhile listen on the art of persuasion even if the main subject discussed is unpleasant.

Ep. 276 – Scott Adams: The Hardest Sell: Convincing Someone You’re Not What You Used to Be – Altucher ConfidentialPlease remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.
